description_long: This is a small, boxy van with a white base color, heavily decorated with graffiti-style text and colorful spray-painted patterns. The left side features the words 'JUNK VAN' in blue, while the right side reads 'THROW ME AWAY!' in a similar style. The rear of the van displays the phrase 'KILL ME' in red, and the roof is adorned with looping, multicolored lines. The van has four wheels, blacked-out windows, and visible wear and tear, suggesting it is old and possibly abandoned. The overall appearance is that of a neglected, vandalized urban vehicle.
description: A small, white van covered in graffiti and colorful spray paint, with blacked-out windows and signs of heavy wear.
description_view_0: Left side view showing 'JUNK VAN' graffiti, green lower panel, and two wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view with 'KILL ME' graffiti in red, two rear windows, and bumper details.
description_view_2: Right side view with 'THROW ME AWAY!' graffiti, green lower panel, and two wheels.
description_view_3: Front view with blacked-out windshield, headlights, and visible front bumper damage.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
